home.heading: The Latin Supplier Your
home.body: Premium Latin products with fixed deliveries, clear pricing and the service you deserve — for restaurants, delis, caterers and anyone who takes Latin food seriously.

problem.title: Does This Sound Familiar?
problem.subtitle: We know what you face every day when sourcing Latin products for your business
problem.card1text: Arepas, tequeños, yuca, Latin cheeses... never available when you need them.
problem.card2text: Generalist distributors with no real knowledge of Latin cuisine and products.
problem.card3text: No clear policy, no volume discounts, no way to plan your costs.
problem.card4text: No fixed routes, no clear schedules, no reliability you can count on.

solution.title: Designed for Your Business
solution.subtitle: We're not just another supplier. We're your strategic partner for Latin products.
solution.contentTitle: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
solution.feat1text: Only high-turnover products you actually sell: arepas, tequeños, empanadas, yuca, plantain, Latin cheeses, sauces and fruit pulps.
solution.feat2text: Clear tiered policy: more purchases = more discounts. From -5% to -15% plus exclusive perks.
solution.feat3text: Zürich divided into 4 profitable zones. You know when we arrive, plan your stock, eliminate stress.
solution.feat4title: A Partner Who Speaks Latin Food
solution.feat4text: Our team grew up eating this. We know every product, every dish, every supplier. We don't just deliver — we guide your purchases.
solution.ctaDesc: Interested in our full range? Get in touch with us and we'll provide you with a complete product catalogue tailored to your needs.
solution.catalogueSoon: Catalogue coming soon — contact us for a personalised version
solution.modal_p1_history: A 3,000-year-old staple of Venezuelan and Colombian cuisine. This grilled corn cake is the daily bread of the Andean region, eaten at every meal of the day.
solution.modal_p1_pairing: Black beans, shredded beef, avocado, white cheese, fried egg. The perfect base for any filling your kitchen inspires.
solution.modal_p2_history: Born in Los Teques, Venezuela. These cheese-stuffed bread twists are the soul of every Venezuelan party, served as a beloved appetiser at celebrations for generations.
solution.modal_p2_pairing: Guasacaca (Venezuelan avocado sauce), hot sauce, or simply on their own as the perfect party starter.
solution.modal_p3_history: Brought to Latin America by Spanish colonisers in the 16th century, each country made them their own. Colombian empanadas use corn dough filled with rice, potato and spiced meat.
solution.modal_p3_pairing: Ají colombiano, guacamole or chimichurri. Perfect as a starter, snack or street food at any restaurant.
solution.modal_p4_history: Cultivated in South America for over 5,000 years, yuca (cassava) was the primary food of indigenous peoples. Fried yuca is crispy outside and pillowy soft inside — comfort food at its finest.
solution.modal_p4_pairing: Hogao (Colombian tomato-onion sauce), garlic aioli or chimichurri. An irresistible and versatile side dish.
solution.modal_p5_history: Plantains arrived in Latin America via Africa and the Caribbean. Maduros — ripe, sweet, caramelised plantains — are a fundamental side dish in Venezuelan, Colombian and Caribbean kitchens.
solution.modal_p5_pairing: Black beans and rice, pabellón criollo, or with a dollop of sour cream and crumbled white cheese.
solution.modal_p6_history: White cheeses like queso blanco and queso de mano trace back to Spanish colonialism merged with indigenous and African food traditions. Today they are an essential ingredient across Latin American gastronomy.
solution.modal_p6_pairing: Melted inside arepas, fried as queso frito, or crumbled over soups, beans and fresh salads.
solution.modal_p7_history: Latin American sauces — guasacaca, ají, hogao — are the soul of the cuisine. Passed down through generations as family secrets, they transform simple ingredients into memorable dishes.
solution.modal_p7_pairing: Universal accompaniment: grilled meats, arepas, empanadas, yuca, rice — there is nothing that does not improve with a great Latin sauce.
solution.modal_p8_history: Latin America's extraordinary biodiversity delivers maracuyá (passion fruit), guanábana (soursop), lulo and tamarind. Flash-frozen pulps preserve all their authentic tropical flavour.
solution.modal_p8_pairing: Natural juices, smoothies, cocktails, desserts and bases for sauces and marinades. The taste of the tropics in every preparation.

pricing.title: Our Prices Are Earned
pricing.subtitle: The more consistent you are, the better conditions you get. Simple as that.

process.title: Simple, Direct, Effective
process.subtitle: In 4 steps you go from searching for suppliers to having fixed weekly deliveries
process.step1desc: We talk for 30 minutes. We understand your menu, volume and needs. No commitment, no pressure.
process.step2desc: We send you a personalised catalogue with prices based on your purchase level. Everything clear from day one.
process.step3desc: We coordinate your first delivery on your zone's fixed route. Try products and service risk-free.
process.step4desc: We add you to our weekly route. Predictable stock, growing discounts, guaranteed peace of mind.

ctabanner.title: Ready to Simplify Your Operation?
ctabanner.description: Schedule a 30-minute meeting and discover how KELU can become your trusted supplier.

team.title: The People Behind KELU
team.subtitle: Three friends. Two countries. One shared mission.
team.storyP1: Luis and Andrés grew up in Venezuela. Kevin grew up in Colombia. Three friends shaped by the same arepas, the same sauces, the same deep love for Latin food.
team.storyP2: Living in Switzerland, they faced the same frustration every week: finding authentic Latin ingredients was nearly impossible. Generalist suppliers with no knowledge, unstable stock, and zero passion for the cuisine.
team.storyP3: Instead of accepting it, they built the solution. KELU is their way of honouring their roots — bringing authentic Latin flavour, and the culture behind it, to the heart of Europe.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Whether you're looking for a reliable Latin food supplier or want to explore partnership opportunities, we'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1body: We only collect information you explicitly provide, such as your name and email when submitting the contact form.
privacy.s2body: Your information is used solely to respond to your enquiry. We never sell or share it with third parties.
privacy.s3body: This site uses essential cookies required for basic functionality. With your consent, we also use Google Analytics (GA4) to understand how visitors navigate our site — this data is anonymised and aggregated. No advertising cookies are ever used. You can accept or decline analytics cookies via the consent banner shown on your first visit. For full details, see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.s4body: If you are in the EU or Switzerland, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of any personal data we hold. You may also withdraw consent for analytics cookies at any time by clearing your browser cookies and declining on your next visit.
privacy.s5body: For any privacy-related questions, reach out via our

terms.s3body: This site is provided on an as-is basis. KELU GmbH is not liable for any damages arising from use of the site.
terms.s4body: We may link to third-party websites. We have no control over their content and accept no responsibility for them.
terms.s5body: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.s6body: For any questions about these terms, contact us via our

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how you interact with our content.
cookiePolicy.howWeUseText: Kelu GmbH uses cookies solely to improve your browsing experience and understand how visitors use our site. We do not use cookies for advertising or sell any data to third parties.
cookiePolicy.typesEssentialText: Required for the site to function correctly. These cannot be disabled. They include session management and security tokens.
cookiePolicy.typesAnalyticsText: We use Google Analytics (GA4) to understand how visitors navigate our site (pages visited, time on site, referral source). This data is anonymised and aggregated. No personally identifiable information is collected.
cookiePolicy.typesPreferenceText: We store your language and theme (light/dark) preference locally so the site remembers your settings between visits.
cookiePolicy.thirdPartyText: Google Analytics sets its own cookies (_ga, _ga_*) to distinguish users and sessions. These cookies are governed by Google's Privacy Policy. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking at any time via
cookiePolicy.managingText: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings at any time. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the site. For more information, visit
cookiePolicy.rightsText: If you are located in the EU or Switzerland, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of any personal data we hold.
cookiePolicy.changesText: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date at the top.

cookies.bannerText: We use cookies to analyse site traffic and improve your experience.

deliveryMap.title: We Come to You
deliveryMap.subtitle: Currently operating in Zürich. Expanding to cover all of Switzerland.
deliveryMap.currentDesc: 4 weekly delivery zones covering the Zürich metropolitan area.
deliveryMap.expandDesc: National expansion in progress. Contact us if you're outside Zürich.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before placing your first order.
faq.a1: Our minimum order is 500 CHF per delivery. This applies to all clients regardless of tier.
faq.a2: We operate fixed weekly routes by zone. Once onboarded, you receive a confirmed delivery day each week — no surprises, no chasing.
faq.q3: Which areas do you currently serve?
faq.a3: We currently serve the Zürich area across 4 delivery zones. We are expanding to cover all of Switzerland — reach out if you're outside Zürich and we'll work something out.
faq.q4: How do I become a client?
faq.a4: Contact us via the form or WhatsApp. We'll schedule a 30-minute call to understand your needs and send you a personalised catalogue with pricing.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept bank transfer (IBAN). Payment terms and invoicing frequency are agreed during onboarding.
faq.q6: Can I get a product catalogue?
faq.a6: Yes. We prepare a tailored catalogue for each client based on their menu and volume. Request it via the contact page or download our general catalogue above.
faq.a7: Yes. Frozen products (arepas, fruit pulps, etc.) are delivered with appropriate cold chain packaging to ensure quality on arrival.
faq.a8: Our tiered pricing rewards consistency: 500–2,499 CHF/month = −5%, 2,500–4,999 CHF/month = −10%, 5,000+ CHF/month = −15%, plus exclusive perks for strategic clients.
